description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with extensive use of glass walls, providing a transparent view of the interior spaces. The structure includes two visible stories, with an open-plan layout that incorporates a living area, dining space, and what appears to be a recreational or pool area. The exterior is clad in a combination of gray paneling and large glass panels, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections slightly elevated, and there are minimal overhangs or decorative elements. Windows are arranged in large, continuous panes, maximizing natural light and visibility. The main entryway is understated, integrated into the glass facade, and lacks traditional steps or a porch.
description: A modern, two-story house with extensive glass walls, flat roof, and open-plan interior spaces. The design emphasizes transparency, clean lines, and a sleek gray exterior.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the house with large glass panels, revealing the open-plan interior and multiple rooms.
description_view_1: This view highlights the narrow end of the house, showing the central staircase and a clear view through the glass facade.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible here, with more glass walls and a clear view of the interior layout, including the staircase and open spaces.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the other narrow end, showing the pool or recreational area and the continuation of the glass and gray paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows, continuous glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist glass entry integrated into facade, no steps or porch, no decorative elements
